#	"Forsstr?m, P., Juola, J., Hovi, A. & Rautiainen, M. (2021). Dataset of understory reflectance spectra and fractional cover in a boreal forest area in Finland, doi: 10.17632/2g9nkcdj53.1 (ver 3)"
#	Forest floor reflectance data
#	"Absorption bands removed and filled linearly: [1350,1483] and [1789,2074] nm"
#	Average of all spectra of sites in the VT (sub-xeric) fertility class
#	Overstory always pine
# wl(nm)	reflectance
